description: Execute V0.8 CLI Architecture Refactor: Fix the fundamental design flaw in the CLI entry points. Instead of exposing multiple disconnected binaries (and creating duck-tape aliases that break NPX), expose a single unified binary named 'team-agents-cowork' that accepts subcommands ('init', 'mcp', 'review'). Update package.json and all documentation to reflect standard open-source CLI conventions (e.g., 'npx team-agents-cowork init').
scope: 1. Create bin/team-agents-cowork.js as a command router. 2. Update package.json to ONLY expose 'team-agents-cowork' in the bin object. 3. Rewrite all installation docs and READMEs to use 'npx team-agents-cowork init', 'team-agents-cowork mcp', and 'team-agents-cowork review'. 4. Remove the broken 'team-agents-cowork-init' and other disjointed bin aliases.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Node.js DAG execution runner (V0.9). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ beyond the bin definitions.
